title: Cost Ledger Record Schema
description: One JSON record per verifier invocation, appended to ~/.claude/popkit/cost-ledger.jsonl (USER-LOCAL — survives `git clean -fdx` and repo rename). The dispatcher uses this for daily-cap aggregation per lane_id+date. See ~/.claude/plans/verifier-pair-infrastructure-v1.md (Cost caps section). NOT stored under repo .claude/ — that's per-turn artifact territory.

repo.description: GitHub repo in 'owner/name' form. Same value used in lane manifest.

turn_id.description: Optional. Lets cross-reference with the turn's bundle when bundles exist (recent runs).

date.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD). Used for per-day aggregation.

estimated_tokens.description: Pre-invocation estimate from the cheap tokenizer pass over the bundle. Recorded even when the run is refused for exceeding cost_cap_tokens_per_run (estimated_tokens > cap, actual_tokens=0, verdict='human').

actual_tokens.description: Post-run usage from Codex CLI metrics. Zero when the run was refused pre-invocation.

verdict.description: What the verifier returned (or 'human' for pre-invocation refusals).

refusal_reason.description: Set when verdict='human' came from a dispatcher gate rather than the verifier itself.
